recent_calls.summary: Kelly called to cancel her seasonal cleaning appointment scheduled for next Tuesday at her property in Chesterfield. She confirmed she is the owner and does not want to reschedule the appointment at this time. The agent confirmed the cancellation details and the call ended without further requests.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, facilitated the transfer without any issues.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user called and asked if someone could return the call. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user, Omar, called to schedule a regular summer AC check under their American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details, including the preferred time of Friday afternoon, and informed Omar that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him to confirm. Omar declined additional information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call.

The user, Ariel from Hemlane, called to report a misdial from Budget's number and requested to be transferred to someone who could assist. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate live agent.

The user called to inquire about the refrigerant amount and cost for an AC service dispatch. The agent was unable to provide pricing details and transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user called back after receiving a call from Budget and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The agent acknowledged the user's request and successfully transferred the call.

The user, Milton Guzman, a property manager, called to schedule a service appointment for a tenant's hot water tank that is not lighting. The agent successfully booked an appointment for Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 4 PM and collected all necessary details. The user provided positive feedback with a suggestion for improvement.
The user, Ariel from Hamline, called back after missing a call from Budget. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the callback and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
No conversation happened.

The user called to request air conditioning service because their system was putting out cool but not cold air. The agent booked a provisional appointment for Thursday at 2 PM and confirmed the details with the user. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.
The user called to request a service visit for their air conditioning unit. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent who could assist further and successfully transferred the call.

Betsy Williams called to check if Budget received her claim from American Home Warranty regarding her cooling system not working. The agent confirmed her details and scheduled a service for her cooling emergency. Betsy declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call experience.

Andrew called to reschedule his wife's air conditioning check appointment from Tuesday, April 21st to Thursday, April 23rd at 10 AM. The agent confirmed the details, including the American Home Shield dispatch number, and informed Andrew that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him to confirm availability. Andrew expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to inquire about the earliest available service appointment for their AC unit, which is not cooling properly. The agent explained that exact timing cannot be guaranteed until the request is submitted online and reviewed by the team. The user declined to provide their address and ended the call after receiving this information.

The user, Robin, called back after being disconnected from a previous live agent and requested to be connected to a live person again. The agent, Sophie, confirmed the request and successfully transferred the call to another live agent.

The user called Budget and requested to speak to a live person. The AI assistant, Sophie, confirmed she was not a live person and then transferred the call to a live agent as requested. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.
The user called Budget and requested to speak with a live person. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to another agent for further assistance.

The user called on behalf of their parents to arrange service for an air conditioning unit that is not cooling. The agent collected the parents' contact information and confirmed that the service team will reach out directly to coordinate a suitable time since no slots are currently available. The user confirmed the details and did not request further assistance.

The user confirmed receiving a message about an email for electronic signature and inquired if it was not a paper form. The agent clarified the process and the user requested to speak with someone else, leading to a successful call transfer to a live agent.

Kevin called to reschedule his AC maintenance appointment. The agent confirmed the details and successfully booked the appointment for Friday, April 17th, from 4 to 6 PM. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback and no further assistance requested.

The user, Danielle Mills, called to schedule a routine AC tune-up through American Home Shield and provided all necessary details including her contact information and dispatch number. The agent confirmed the information and informed her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out shortly. The user expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs.

The user called to cancel a cooling service appointment scheduled for the next day, which was confirmed and processed by the agent. The user declined information about maintenance programs and did not wish to provide feedback. The call ended with the user satisfied and the cancellation confirmed.

Ruby Jones called Budget to report an air conditioning unit that is not cooling, emphasizing the urgency due to her health condition. The agent collected all necessary information, including the dispatch number, service address, and contact details, and confirmed the service request for as soon as possible. The user rated the experience positively and provided feedback about the prompt response.

The user, Kelly Burke, called to schedule a seasonal HVAC cleaning for their unit. The agent successfully booked an appointment for April 16, 2026, at 12 PM and informed the user about the dispatch fee and confirmation process. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.

Rick called to schedule an appointment for an AC annual checkup at his home. The agent confirmed details and attempted to access his checkup history but could not, so the call was transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user called to follow up on a quote received a couple of weeks ago. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent for further assistance and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer promptly.

Adrian from American Home Shield called Budget to inquire about the status of a work order related to heating and AC HVAC services. The agent attempted to assist but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user called to cancel today's appointment and confirmed they did not want to reschedule. The agent acknowledged the cancellation and offered further assistance, which the user declined.
The user briefly interacted with the agent but was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 23 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

Vanessa called to report that her air conditioning was not cooling the upstairs of her home properly. She scheduled a service appointment for April 20th at 10 AM, which was successfully booked by the agent. Vanessa provided feedback rating the AI assistant a 3 out of 5, noting the obvious AI presence but no confusion during the call.

Lauren called to follow up on a heating and cooling service issue where the fan motor was not working despite previous technician visits. She scheduled a service appointment for Wednesday afternoon at her home address in Saint Peters, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details and informed Lauren that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to schedule a routine tune-up and cooling service for their AC unit and requested the earliest available appointment. The user identified as the owner and asked to speak to a live agent, after which the call was transferred successfully.

Jonathan Nierling called to schedule a service appointment for his air conditioner, which is not blowing cold air and may need a coolant recharge. The agent provisionally booked an appointment for Thursday, April 16th at 8 AM and confirmed the details with Jonathan. Jonathan also expressed interest in signing up for the budget service agreement again.
The user requested to speak to someone, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Andrea called to report an issue with her air conditioning not cooling properly and a thermostat system failure. The agent scheduled a service appointment for the next day at 4 PM and confirmed the booking with Andrea. The user provided positive feedback about the quick service.

The user, Taylor Roland, called to schedule a service appointment for their air conditioner that is not cooling the house, under their home warranty with dispatch ID 34186159. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another agent. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

Barbara called to report that her air conditioner, which was serviced two weeks ago, is now turning on but not cooling. The agent confirmed her contact details and service address, assured her that the team would be notified promptly, and the call ended with no further questions from Barbara.

The user called to set up an appointment for a cooling system repair. The agent gathered some information but the user requested to speak directly to another agent, leading to a call transfer. The call ended with the user being transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another representative. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

Lorraine Mckinney called to confirm a routine service check for HVAC and plumbing at her home, preferring an early evening appointment. The agent updated the service request accordingly and offered to collect feedback later. The call ended with no further questions from the user.

The user called to make arrangements for air conditioner service and requested to speak with a live agent. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
